message:
feat(slack): implement ConnectorErrorMapping trait with full test coverage

Add fcp-sdk dependency and implement ConnectorErrorMapping for SlackError,
continuing the systematic adoption across all connectors:

- from_async_error: maps Timeout (preserves is_timeout flag), Cancelled,
  ProtocolIo, Join, Runtime, ChannelClosed, ChannelFull to SlackError::Http
- to_fcp_error/is_retryable/retry_after: delegate to existing inherent methods

Tests cover all 6 AsyncError variants plus trait method delegation for
to_fcp_error, is_retryable, and retry_after.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
